---
title: "devnotes"
---

# Website TODO

## About

- Add IAAO certifications

- Mention conference publications

- Add downloadable CV

## Research

- Current projects

- Research Questions

- Ideas Under Exploration

- Publications

## Articles

- Ratio Studies

- Sales Chasing

- Land Valuation

- Data Quality

## Long-term

- Interactive calculators

- Assessment dashboard

- Blog
